summary: Mandatory CC==1 and bicondylar discriminator gates both reproduce exactly from scratch; sesamoid/osteophyte protection clean at 0 voxels. Concern: patella and menisci remain unsegmented (honestly escalated, not concealed).

subphase_assessments.threshold: Verified filtered.nii.gz present, correct spacing; manual Amira-scale thresholds recorded and finite; medium confidence appropriate given non-bimodal histogram.
subphase_assessments.watershed: Independently recomputed femur cc=1, tibia cc=1, interface overlap ~12.6% of smaller bbox, no unexpected face contact. needs-seeds -> curated -> ready path confirmed in driver.log, not a shortcut.
subphase_assessments.structure-assignment: Bicondylar discriminator reimplemented from scratch and reproduces exactly (fem_frac=0.85, tib_frac=0.5, PASS, margin 0.35 vs required 0.15). Sesamoid/osteophyte-in-condyle-slab check recomputed as 0. Patella/menisci genuinely absent, honestly flagged in review_flags rather than fabricated.
